3	Stefan Georgi
MODULE 7	Lead Example - Dog Food
Crafting
Attention-Grabbing

EXAMPLE
Dog Food
(00:00)
Yo. All right, we’re going to do another lead here. This one is going to be for a
pet product. This one’s a dog food company actually and this letter is one of
my favorite letters I ever wrote. The lead is good. There’s other parts of the
letter that I like even more. I hate to tease you like that, I’m just thinking out
loud, but let me just share with the lead and I’ll share what I think could’ve
been better about it. The lead, especially and I took the guy’s name out who
is the person.
(00:40)
So “Hi, I’m a blank and inside this highly controversial presentation, I’m going
to show you a simple, inexpensive and 100% natural way to potentially add
years to your dog’s life. This is something that could quickly improve virtually
every aspect of your dog’s health; giving your dog a beautiful and shiny coat,
strengthening your dog’s joints, bones and muscles, putting an end to bad
breath, stinky odor, and those nasty farts, and even protecting your dog from
many of the leading causes of canine death today.
(01:06)
I should also mention that this is something that works no matter if your dog
is a puppy or an “old-timer” and no matter what size or breed your dog is as
well. In fact, this “5-minute fix” has now been used by tens of thousands of
people all across North America. People whose dogs range from Chihuahuas
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 7 --

4	Stefan Georgi
MODULE 7	Lead Example - Dog Food
to Great Danes and who are shocked to report that their four-legged friends
now have more energy, better mobility and greater health than ever before.
(01:26)
People like Cindy and Kevin Mowez who owns Zircon Kennels and work
with dozens of dogs each year, they write: the results have been absolutely
wonderful. Our dogs’ coats are so shiny and rich in color. They’re not as gassy
and their stools are firm. Plus their teeth and breath are much better. We
are believers! And Kim and Craig of Canada who write about their Labrador
puppies: Not only did all of our puppies’ miserable symptoms disappear, but
they’re happier boys was softer, shinier coats. For a similar cost to the kibble
we were buying, our dogs are now healthier and happier. As puppy parents, we
couldn’t be more grateful. Thank you for everything! Those are just a few of the
dozens of testimonials I get each month from people just like you. Folks who
are using the simple, natural breakthrough I share inside this presentation to
totally revitalize the health of the dogs they love.
(02:10)
Now you’ll hear from more real life people just like Cindy, Kevin, Kim and Craig
a little later on in this letter and even more importantly, about 3 minutes from
now, I’m also going to share why traditional supermarket brands could be
leading your dog to an early grave and why even the most expensive types
of “premium” and “natural” dog food on the market are actually stuffed with
secret fillers that might be making your dog sick from the inside out.
(02:30)
Plus, I’ll also be sharing the results of a disturbing new study published in one
of the world’s top veterinarian journals, which proves that over 80% of raw dog
food may actually be worse for your dog than kibble.” Here’s a proof element.
“So please pay close attention here because not only will what I’m going to
share give you a happier, healthier and calmer dog now and potentially save
you thousands of dollars on veterinarian bills over the next 5 years, it could very
well save your dog’s life. In fact, I only wish I had known about this information
back when my 8-year-old Great Pyrenees Zorro was diagnosed with cancer
because if I had, I truly believe things would have turned out differently than
they did. More on that in a second. So please, pay close attention for the
next few minutes and I’ll show you just how easy it is to give your dog the
protection he deserves.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 7 --

5	Stefan Georgi
MODULE 7	Lead Example - Dog Food
(03:13)
So I mentioned my name is blank and my dog Zorro was diagnosed with cancer
back in date, it felt like I’d been hit in the gut with a hammer” and it goes into
the story.
(03:21)
So what do I like about the lead? Why did I feel like this lead could have
been better. The biggest thing is I could have done a version of it teasing
the emotional story about the guys dog’s Zorro earlier on is one thing and
another thing would be basically the mechanism. What the product is it’s
a raw, dehydrated dog food, so you get the convenience of kibble, but the
nutrition of raw food and the food is great. I became a total believer as I was
writing this copy and researching it.
(03:54)
There’s 13 ingredients on average; if you look at all these other natural, high-
end, premium, healthy like dry dog foods, they all had way more ingredients
and then for this one, too the first ingredient is 60% salmon, 50% chicken and
it’s not just like the shitty parts of the animal, it’s the good parts. There’s just
really good stuff and the mechanism behind this one was about how dogs in
the wild, and it’s true, I found a type of dog in the wild that lives longer or about
the same as the average American house dog does and the question was why?
How is it that wild dogs live as long as house dogs do when they don’t face
any of the dangerous, it was the paradoxical question, and the answer was
basically their diet and it was this idea of how we’re feeding our dogs all this
processed crap that they weren’t designed to eat. I used the story in the sales
letter about a city dog versus a country dog and the story about someone who
lived in the country on a farm and they fed their dog table scraps and food
from the farm and they moved to the city and the dog started getting sick and
they couldn’t figure out why. But it’s because the dog had gone from a country
diet, which was like real raw foods, to a city diet. I just think that’s what’s really
interesting and probably it could have teased some more of that in the lead.
(05:17)
That being said, I like that there’s the big promises here. I know potentially add
years to dog’s life is a big promise, but honestly, if you look at the crap that’s
in a lot of these processed foods, it’s like really fucked up and giving your
dog a better diet very well could potentially add years to their life so I don’t
think that’s a crazy claim to make. I don’t know about from a legal standpoint,
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

but at least from a moral or ethical standpoint. But we’re making promises
while also double edging it where it’s pain point and problems so bad breaths,
stinky odours, nasty farts.
(05:56)
We do the emotional discovery story at the very end. I only wish I had known
about this before for my Great Pyrenees Zorro was diagnosed with cancer,
so we’re teasing the emotional discovery story. We aren’t really teasing a
mechanism, a unique mechanism. Contrarian nature, we are doing a little bit
of that because at the end we have these, not at the end, but here we have
these fascinations. Why supermarket brands could be leading your dog to an
early grave, why expensive and premium natural dog foods on the market are
stuffed with secret fillers that may be making your dog sick from the inside out
and the disturbing new results published in one of the world’s top veterinarian
journal is proving 80% of raw dog food may be worse for your dog than kibble;
those are fascinations. We did check that box but also, the contrarian nature
is right there with why these traditional solutions suck.
(06:54)
Briefly addressing skepticism, the testimonials because you’ve got these
people who own a dog kennel saying that they like it. Well, I guess that’s
more like credibility. I guess it kind of serves as both to be honest with you.
I’m mentioning more testimonials and you’ll hear from more of them. Just
promising that you’re going to hear from more people can kind of help to
temporarily address skepticism as well and of course, it does have testimonials.
So this one really checks most of the boxes, too. The 5-minute fix is sort of a
promise. Oh and then by the way, sorry, the qualification or the qualifier, who
would this work for? Something that works no matter if your dog is a puppy
or an old-timer, no matter what size or breed as well. So we are saying the
qualifier of who this works for.
(07:38)
So that one is for a dog food company and hopefully, you find it valuable and
I’ll stop this and guess what, I’m going to do another one after this.
